{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Malice
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Monarch, Queen of Shadows, Sage of Eternal Night, investigator
| abilities = Path of Eternal Night, Path of Seven Pages, pure shadow Path, Forger techniques, Ruler techniques, shadow tendrils, Monarch-level messenger construct, World of Night
| affiliations = Akura clan
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Akura Malice Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura]] [[Malice]] is the [[Monarch]] and ruler of the [[Akura clan]], known as [[the Queen]] of Shadows. She governs the western [[Ashwind continent]] from her territory, which features a capital city called [[Moongrave]]. A powerful [[sacred artist]], she practices a pure shadow Path focused on [[Ruler]] and [[Forger techniques]], though she also created the Book of Eternal Night as an idealized version of her own [[Path]]. Her presence is often characterized by a signature aesthetic of dark purple and black, including floating fortresses and shadow-based armor that serves as a bloodline legacy for her family. [[Malice]] is a formidable combatant capable of immense feats, such as manifesting massive shadow structures or engaging in large-scale warfare. Her personality is described as merciless and driven by the virtue her name implies, often using fear to maintain authority. Despite her reputation for being callous, she has shown investment in certain family members, such as her daughter [[Akura Mercy]]. Within the clan, she maintains a strict hierarchy; her children must undergo trials involving specialized Books to prove their talent and earn recognition within the head family. Those who fail these tests are relegated to branch families and are separated from her after birth.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Akura Malice]] gave [[Eithan]] her blessing.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Malice]] is a figure associated with the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|As a [[Monarch]], [[Akura]] [[Malice]] is the mother of [[Mercy]]. Her direct descendants must undergo testing by Books within a dream-world to prove they are her true sons and daughters. Rather than bonding with a [[Remnant]], these children use special means to open their [[soulspace]] early in an attempt to bond with Divine Treasures. [[Akura]] [[Malice]] eventually emerges from the shadows, her eyes blazing with a pure and endless purple light while displaying crystallized purple nails.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Malice]]'s children must prove themselves to be acknowledged as the [[Monarch]]’s true sons and daughters.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Malice]] is a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Malice]]'s direct descendants attempt to bond with Divine Treasures instead of a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Malice]]'s descendants use special means to open their [[soulspace]] early for bonding with Divine Treasures.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Malice]]'s descendants are tested by Books in a dream-world.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Malice]]'s eyes blaze with pure, endless purple light.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Malice]] is [[Mercy's mother]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Malice]] has purple nails that may be crystallized.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Malice]] emerges from shadow.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Malice]] is the mother of [[Akura Fury]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] Arelius fights for [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] is chosen of [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Malice]] stands in midair over her mountain.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Queen]] of Shadows and ruler of the western [[Ashwind continent]], [[Akura]] [[Malice]] lounges upon a [[Forged]] throne of shadows with purple eyes. As the creator of the [[Path of Seven Pages]], she follows the [[Path]] of Eternal Night and practices a pure shadow Path that emphasizes [[Ruler]] and [[Forger techniques]], represented by the color black. Though she is a target for [[Sopharanatoth]]'s [[Penance]], she maintains that she would rather die than leave the world. During the [[Uncrowned]] tournament, her group is represented by three [[Monarchs]], one of whom received an appeal from [[Min Shuei]]. While [[Yerin]] has only known her through blurry memories or distant sightings, [[Akura]] [[Malice]] holds specific expectations of [[Lindon]] and is a mother to a daughter.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]] lounges on a [[Forged]] throne of shadows and has purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]] is a target for [[Sopharanatoth]]'s [[Penance]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]] would rather die than leave the world.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]] is a group represented by three [[Monarchs]] in the [[Uncrowned]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]]'s [[shadow madra]] is represented by black.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]] is a [[Monarch]] whom [[Min Shuei]] appealed to.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]] has expectations of [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]] has a daughter.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] had only seen [[Akura Malice]] from a distance or in blurry memories.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]] is [[the Queen]] of Shadows and ruler of the western [[Ashwind continent]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]] follows the [[Path]] of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]] is the creator of the [[Path of Seven Pages]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Malice]] practices a pure shadow Path with an emphasis on [[Forger]] and [[Ruler techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The creator of the original doorway used by [[Charity]], [[Akura]] [[Malice]] is a formidable presence capable of communicating her will across vast distances through a [[Monarch]]-level messenger construct. Clad in purple crystal armor, she wields a shimmering blue bow featuring a shaft of glacial ice that glows like moonbeams. In combat, she utilizes shadow tendrils to seize her targets and has been seen physically pushing a [[Titan]] away. During the confrontation with a [[Dreadgod]], she ensured her daughter had an escape route and demonstrated immense strength by closing her fist around a cloudship.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Malice]] made the original doorway [[Charity]] used.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Malice]] uses a bow with a shaft made of glacial ice that shimmers like moonbeams.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Malice]] can use shadow tendrils to seize targets.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Malice]] is capable of communicating over great distances using a [[Monarch]]-level messenger construct that transmits her will.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Malice]] is clad in armor of purple crystal and carries a shimmering blue bow.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Malice]] was pushing the [[Titan]] away.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Malice]] is present and would not let her daughter face a [[Dreadgod]] without providing an escape.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Malice]] closed her fist around the cloudship.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Akura Malice]] wears amethyst armor.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Akura Malice]] uses the [[World of Night]] technique.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Akura Malice]] would not let those who stand in a [[Monarch]]'s way live.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Akura Malice]] healed [[Lindon]]'s wounds with a single word.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura Malice]] was once the [[Sage]] of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura Malice]] wears a violet dress and silver chains with amethysts in her hair.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] shouts for [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura Malice]] personally delivered a message across the [[Ashwind continent]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Known as [[the Queen]] of Shadows, [[Akura]] [[Malice]] was a figure whose will fought for control over the spirit of her child, [[Mercy]]. She also had another child named [[Pride]], and a scale from her body was later used by [[Lindon]] to infuse a brew. While she watched the battle against the [[Weeping Dragon]] from a distance, she exceeded expectations by weaving wishes into the seventh page of the Book of Eternal Night. Although Drosses have sought combat solutions to face her, [[Akura]] [[Malice]] is now dead.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Malice]] has a will that fights for control of [[Mercy]]'s spirit.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Malice]] had children named [[Mercy]] and [[Pride]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] infused the brew with a scale from [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Malice]] watched over most of the fight against the [[Weeping Dragon]] from far away.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Malice]] is known as [[the Queen]] of Shadows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Malice]] wove wishes into the seventh page of the Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Malice]] exceeded expectations.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The character is known as [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Drosses are seeking a combat solution against [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Malice]] is dead.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Malice]] is an investigator.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Malice]] was seen drifting down from the sky to land next to [[Northstrider]]'s body.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
